title: carex riparia subsp. chilensis
intro: Carex riparia subsp. chilensis, also known as Chilean sedge or Riparian sedge, is a subspecies of sedge native to the Andean region of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Carex riparia subsp. chilensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds and skin irritations, and support respiratory health. Carex riparia subsp. chilensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or as a salve or ointment, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
